title: TIM - Add Domain Indicators To SIEM
content:
This playbook receives indicators from its parent playbook and provides the indicators as inputs for the sub-playbooks that push the indicators to the SIEM.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (TIM_SIEM, xsoar-supported).

Use cases: Threat Intelligence Management.
